entries.content: adjective 明显的 míngxiǎn de▸ his nervousness was manifest to us 我们都看出他很紧张
entries.label: A
entries.name: adjective

entries.content: transitive verb ① 清楚显示 qīngchu xiǎnshì▸ she manifested signs of severe depression 她出现了严重抑郁症的症状 ② (be evidence of) 证明 zhèngmíng▸ bad industrial relations are often manifested in strikes 罢工常常是劳资关系恶劣的证明
entries.label: B
entries.name: transitive verb

entries.content: to manifest itself reflexive verb 显现 xiǎnxiàn▸ fear manifests itself in many different forms 恐惧有多种不同的表现形式▸ the disease may never manifest itself 该病可能永远都不会发作
entries.label: C

entries.content: noun ① Nautical 船货清单 chuán huò qīngdān ② Aviation (of passengers) 乘客名单 chéngkè míngdān; (of cargo) 货单 huòdān
entries.label: D
entries.name: noun
